ab: nau ila musuwa lu makamulringedele ludhaa ene?
ch: W:我和您約明天下午好嗎?
en: Can I make an appointment with you tomorrow afternoon?

ch: M:可以，我們約哪裡見面?
en: Sure, where should we meet?

ch: W:我們約學校好嗎?我們要錄影。
en: How about meeting at school? We need to shoot a video.

ab: taikai hahubuwa amani, tasikahingalai ku kacalrilrisiyana.
ch: M:那去聚會所好了，我會穿族服去。
en: Then let’s go to the community center. I’ll wear folk costume.

ab: ku sakera ki cekelenai lungipaipai maela ki thahihi. lu ngipaipainga puhana kelangaili silape.
ch: W: 我們部落的櫻花盛開很漂亮。等花開的時候你來找我吧!
en: The cherry blossoms in our tribe are beautiful when they bloom. Come find me when the flowers bloom!

ab: laikaita mukalava pakela ki kalahyahiga, kai ngyalalrange tuhamuhu!
ch: M: 那要等到春天，太晚了吧!
en: That would have to wait until spring. It’s too late, isn’t it?

ch: W: 那你豐年祭的時候來吧!
en: Then come during our Harvest Festival!

ch: M: 好啊!我很期待!
en: Alright! I’m looking forward to it!

ch: W: 請問你為甚麼要搬回部落生活?
en: May I ask why you decided to move back to the tribe?

ch: M: 我要回去教書。
en: I want to return to teach at the local school.

ch: W: 為甚麼不在都市教書?
en: Why not teach in the city?

ab: mabahengehaku ki cekeleli, lasidramaku ku apangibilriya ki cekele.
ch: M: 因為我懷念我的故鄉，也希望能回饋部落。
en: Because I miss my hometown and I also want to give back to the tribe.

ab: malrigilisu tinunu, anea ku wabulru musuwa?
ch: M:你很會織布，是誰教你的?
en: You’re very skilled at weaving, who taught you?

ab: amani ku kaingu, amani ku malrilrigilinga tinunu ki cekelenai.
ch: W:是我的奶奶，她是我們部落最會織布的人。
en: It was my grandmother, she is the most skilled weaver in our tribe.

ch: M:你怎麼會想要學織布?
en: How did you develop an interest in learning weaving?

ab: kay watinunu kakuakudhaneta, apya pacungulaku ikay kakuakudhaneta.
ch: W:織布是我們的文化，我想要讓文化延續。
en: Weaving is a part of our culture, and I want to ensure its continuity.

ch: M:這個小米酒真好喝。
en: This millet wine is delicious.

ch: W:是我自己釀的喔!
en: I made it myself!

ch: M:你真厲害，這要釀很久嗎?
en: You’re really talented. Does it take a long time to make?

ab: ini, aimakapitulu. wasalengemadu ku becenge si tubuungu, lathalre pakamamelre, lupuliyunga pauwa ki dilrungu, la pauwanga ku bae.
ch: W:不用，大約一周就好了。把脫殼小米泡水後搗成粉，攪拌至稠狀，裝到甕裡，加入紅藜粉就可以了。
en: No, it only takes about a week. Pound the hulled millet into flour after soaking it in water, stir it until it thickens, put it into an urn and add red quinoa powder to it.
